afk_monitor.shortDescription: AFK detection and notification for all players
afk_monitor.description: Monitors all players for inactivity, alerts console when idle threshold reached. Toggle with /afk, set time with /afktime, set movement tolerance with /afkradius.

current_weapon_info.shortDescription: Displays current weapon name and ammo count on the HUD
current_weapon_info.description: Displays equipped weapon name, magazine & reserve ammo top-left. Periodic updates, toggle /wpninfo.

idle_reminder.shortDescription: Reminds you if you've been idle for too long
idle_reminder.description: HUD reminder ('You there?') after configurable idle time. Toggle /idle.

low_ammo_warning.shortDescription: Flashes a warning when your weapon ammo is low
low_ammo_warning.description: Flashes 'LOW AMMO!' HUD warning when magazine ammo below configurable threshold. Repeats while low.

mini_compass.shortDescription: Displays a cardinal direction compass on the HUD
mini_compass.description: Shows cardinal direction compass (N, NE, E, SE, S, SW, W, NW) on HUD. Smooth updates, toggle /compass.

player_details.shortDescription: Prints detailed stats of any player to the console
player_details.description: /pinfo <index> displays team, health, shields, weapon, ammo, coordinates to console.

player_status.shortDescription: Displays live status of all players in the console
player_status.description: Live console overlay of all players' team, health/shield %, weapon, ammo. Toggle /pstatus.

rest_break_reminder.shortDescription: Reminds you to take a break after extended play sessions
rest_break_reminder.description: On-screen break reminder after configurable playtime (default 45 min), repeats until acknowledged. Toggle /breaks.

session_clock.shortDescription: Shows a session timer for the current map on the HUD
session_clock.description: HUD elapsed time since map start (HH:MM:SS). Toggle /session_clock.

show_player_position.shortDescription: Displays your current coordinates in the console
show_player_position.description: Real-time console display of precise X,Y,Z coordinates, customizable format. Toggle /show_pos.

tip_rotator.shortDescription: Rotates gameplay tips on the HUD
tip_rotator.description: Rotates gameplay tips on HUD covering positioning, awareness, strategy. Toggle /tips.

vehicle_speedometer.shortDescription: Shows your vehicle's speed on the HUD
vehicle_speedometer.description: Shows vehicle speed (km/h) on HUD when driving. Toggle /speedo.

client_crasher.shortDescription: Crashes targeted players' clients on join based on name or hash
client_crasher.description: Auto-crashes joining players whose name/hash matches config, real-time banning.

notify_me.shortDescription: Advanced console notification system for server events
notify_me.description: Custom console notifications: joins, quits, kills/deaths (with cause), first blood, commands, game start/end. ASCII logo, timestamps, pirate hash detection.

auto_message.shortDescription: Automated message broadcaster for server chat
auto_message.description: Sends configurable announcements at intervals, multi-line, optional console output.

chat_formatter.shortDescription: Customizable chat formatter with player ID and name
chat_formatter.description: Custom chat templates: player name, ID, message. Global/team/vehicle chat, option to ignore specific commands.

delayed_welcome.shortDescription: Delayed private welcome message for new players
delayed_welcome.description: Sends private welcome message after a few seconds delay when player joins.

end_game_messages.shortDescription: End-of-game performance messages based on kills
end_game_messages.description: End-of-game private messages based on kill count, taunts to congratulations.

camo_speed.shortDescription: Speed boost on Active Camouflage pickup
camo_speed.description: Temporary speed boost on Active Camo pickup for configurable duration.

killer_rewards.description: Spawns random equipment at player location on configured killstreak (e.g., 10,20,30 kills).

nade_launcher.shortDescription: Toggleable grenade launcher for all weapons
nade_launcher.description: Toggle /nade to replace any projectile with high-speed frag grenade, making any weapon a grenade launcher.

set_flag_limit.description: Overrides CTF flag capture limit to custom value, reapplied each game.

set_respawn_time.shortDescription: Custom respawn delay for all players
set_respawn_time.description: Forces a fixed respawn time (seconds) for all players, overriding gametype.

set_running_speed.shortDescription: Custom player movement speed on spawn
set_running_speed.description: Applies a speed multiplier to all players on spawn.

tactical_insert.shortDescription: Set custom spawn points with /tac command
tactical_insert.description: /tac set marks current location as spawn point, toggle, clear, status. One-time or persistent.

vehicle_blocker.description: Prevents entering vehicles per team, configurable per vehicle tag, custom block message.

vehicle_triggered_portals.description: Map-specific portal spheres: vehicle with player in required seat teleports whole vehicle to destination.

custom_loadouts.description: Choose from multiple weapon loadouts with custom ammo/grenades, applied on spawn. /loadout to switch, admin override, selection menu.

one_in_the_chamber.shortDescription: One in the Chamber pistol duel mode
one_in_the_chamber.description: Pistol with 1 bullet, +1 per kill, melee when empty. Headshot insta-kills.

phasor_util.shortDescription: Common utility functions library for Phasor
phasor_util.description: Reusable library: player health/shields/pos/team/weapons/speed/color/ping, game state, IP validation, string formatting, wildcard matching, object type detection, bit manipulation, designed for require().

flag_capture_notify.description: Console message on flag capture with player name, team, total captures.

vehicle_entry_notify.shortDescription: Vehicle entry notification with seat details
vehicle_entry_notify.description: Console log on vehicle entry: vehicle name, seat (Driver, Gunner).

player_count_timer.shortDescription: Periodic player count display in console
player_count_timer.description: Periodic console message: current players / max slots.

server_name_changer.description: Rotates server name from a predefined list every few seconds.

sapp_server_templates.shortDescription: Pre-configured SAPP server templates for Halo PC and Custom Edition.
sapp_server_templates.description: Ready-to-run SAPP server templates for Halo PC/CE. Includes SAPP, map vote, sample Lua, Windows/Linux launchers. Extract and run.

phasor_server_templates.shortDescription: Pre-configured Phasor V2 server templates for Halo PC and Custom Edition.
phasor_server_templates.description: Ready-to-run Phasor V2 templates for Halo PC/CE. Fully configured with Windows/Linux quick-start scripts. Extract and launch.

laa_patched.shortDescription: Patched Halo executables with Large Address Aware support for improved memory usage.
laa_patched.description: LAA-patched haloce.exe/halo.exe removes 2GB memory limit, allows up to 4GB on 64-bit Windows. Improves stability with large maps/mods.

battle_royale.shortDescription: Custom Battle Royale game mode with shrinking safe zone and loot crates.
battle_royale.description: Custom BR mode: shrinking safe zone, loot crates with random weapons, map configs, auto management. Start with no weapons, scavenge to survive.

wordbuster.shortDescription: Advanced multilingual profanity filter for SAPP servers.
wordbuster.description: Advanced profanity filter (21 languages, leet-speak detection). Warns, kicks/bans, admin immunity, in-game word list management.

admin_manager.shortDescription: Drop-in replacement for SAPP's admin system with unlimited levels and enhanced features.
admin_manager.description: Full SAPP admin system replacement: unlimited hierarchical levels, IP/hash/name bans, admin chat, command spy, join messages, SHA-256 hashing, JSON storage.

pre_game.shortDescription: Pre-match warmup mini-game with infinite time and score limits.
pre_game.description: Pre-match warmup: AR + 2 frags, infinite time/score. When 3+ players, LO3 countdown and map reset to start real game. All game modes.

admin_add_me.shortDescription: Quick admin access utility for testing
admin_add_me.description: '/admin me' grants instant level 4 access. Configurable default level, pirate hash detection, IP-based assignment.

admin_chat.description: Private admin chat with /ac, /adminchat, spam protection, message formatting, permission levels, notification sounds, cooldowns.

admin_manager.shortDescription: Improved admin system with hierarchical levels, integrated bans and admin chat
admin_manager.description: Drop-in replacement: unlimited hierarchical levels, IP/hash/name bans, admin chat, command spy, alias lookup, SHA-256 hashing, per-level join messages, JSON storage.

afk_system.description: Advanced AFK detection: movement/camera/input tracking, custom thresholds, voluntary AFK, admin immunity, progressive warnings, kick messages.

aimbot_scores.description: /botscore [target] [mode] shows accuracy metrics, basic/detailed. Targets: 1-16, me, all/*. Live data, respawn status indicators.

alias_system.shortDescription: Tracks and manages player aliases by hash and IP with lookup commands.
alias_system.description: Logs player aliases by hash/IP. Admin lookup with pagination, pirate hash detection, cooldowns, auto cleanup.

anti_aimbot.description: Multi-layered aim-lock detection: velocity/trajectory/behavior analysis, weapon profiles, sensitivity adjustment, false positive mitigation, live monitoring, enforcement actions.

anti_camp_v1.description: Zone-based camping detection with map-specific restricted areas, progressive warnings, cooldowns, auto reset, custom timers/radius.

anti_camp_v2.description: Map-wide camping detection, adjustable radius, progressive warnings, cooldowns, auto reset on spawn/movement.

anti_impersonator.description: Identity protection via hash/IP verification, kick/ban actions, whitelist, logging. Detects clones, name spoofing, admin impersonation.

auto_team_balance.description: Smart team balance: count-based, optional skill-aware. Frequency 30-300s, min players, force balance, avoid mid-game, protect parties, notifications.

ban_on_sight.shortDescription: Advanced player banning system with IP enforcement
ban_on_sight.description: Instantly ban by ID, IP enforcement, ban list view, live connection monitoring, admin notifications.

block_duplicate_ips.shortDescription: Prevents multiple connections from the same IP address
block_duplicate_ips.description: Detects/block duplicate IP connections, actions: kick/ban, LAN exceptions, admin notices.

breadcrumb_tracker.shortDescription: Tracks player identity across name changes with IP, hash, and VPN detection
breadcrumb_tracker.description: Tracks player identity across name changes via IP/subnet, hash, optional VPN detection (IPQualityScore). Suspicious join alerts with risk score 0-100%. /crumbs query. Pirate hash flagging, 24h API cache, JSON storage, auto cleanup.

clear_chat.description: Instant global chat clearing with admin access controls and notification options.

client_crasher.description: Auto-crashes clients matching banned criteria (names/hashes/IPs), admin crash commands.

freeze_players.shortDescription: Admin tool to temporarily immobilize players with configurable options
freeze_players.description: Freeze players: weapon management, movement restriction, customizable notifications, admin permissions.

multiclient_detector.shortDescription: Advanced multi-client detection with probability scoring
multiclient_detector.description: Multi-client detection with probability 0-100% via port ranges, hashes, behavior. Risk categories, admin alerts.

mute_system.shortDescription: Advanced chat mute system with anti-spam protection
mute_system.description: Mute system: manual/spam mute, command whitelist, timed mutes, anti-spam thresholds, punishments.

name_ban.description: Kick/ban players with default names after grace period, custom messages.

name_replacer.description: Replaces blacklisted/default names with random unique names from list, respects length limit.

ping_checker.description: View own/others' latency via command, custom formatting, permissions.

report_system.shortDescription: In-game player reporting with admin management and auto-expiry
report_system.description: In-game /s_report to file player/bug reports. Admins: /reports (paginated), /report_clear, /players. Cooldown 60s, auto-expiry 600s, logging, admin level 2.

suicide_punisher.description: Punishes excessive suicides in time window, config thresholds, grace, kick/ban durations.

suspend_players.shortDescription: Admin tool to freeze players in place
suspend_players.description: Suspend players: freeze, strip weapons, mute chat, persistence. Unsuspend command.

tag_enforcer.shortDescription: Blocks unauthorized players from using the clan tag.
tag_enforcer.description: Kicks unauthorized players using clan tag based on IP/hash whitelist to prevent impersonation.

team_shuffler.shortDescription: Auto and manual team balancing system
team_shuffler.description: Auto/manual team shuffle with min players, FFA detection, suppress death messages during shuffle.

the_punisher.shortDescription: Team betrayal and friendly fire enforcement
the_punisher.description: Punishes betrayals/friendly fire: progressive warnings, actions (kill/kick/crash), thresholds, logging, notifications.

timed_authentication.shortDescription: Requires players with the clan tag to authenticate within a time limit.
timed_authentication.description: Clan tag join prompt: must type secret phrase within time limit or be kicked. Lightweight access control.

vpn_blocker.shortDescription: Advanced IP screening using IPQualityScore API
vpn_blocker.description: Blocks VPNs/proxies/high-risk IPs via IPQualityScore, risk thresholds, kick/ban, logging.

word_buster.shortDescription: Multilingual chat moderation with progressive enforcement
word_buster.description: Profanity filter (21+ languages, leet-speak). Warnings, kick/ban thresholds, admin immunity, live word list management.

admin_messages.description: Admin join announcements per level, chat/RCON output, customizable formatting, colors, toggleable.

april_fools_chat.shortDescription: Randomly reroutes player chat to others
april_fools_chat.description: Makes other players 'say' your messages when triggering words used. Permission-level limited.

april_fools_word_shuffler.description: 1/3 chance to scramble chat messages, readable but jumbled.

auto_message.description: Scheduled announcements: rotating multi-line messages, interval 30-300s, colors, chat+console, timestamps, on-demand triggers.

chat_ids.shortDescription: Player identification system for chat messages
chat_ids.description: Appends player slot numbers to chat messages, customizable for global/team/vehicle.

expressions.description: Chat commands (!anger, !taunt, !cuss) with randomized family-friendly responses. Configurable phrase lists and formatting.

force_chat.description: Admin forces player to 'say' a message, with permissions, formatting. Use for RP/announcements. May be detectable.

mvp_join_alerts.shortDescription: Personalized welcome messages for VIP players
mvp_join_alerts.description: Custom join alerts for MVP players (by IP/hash/name) and generic greetings for others.

proximity_chat.shortDescription: Localized voice chat with configurable range
proximity_chat.description: Proximity chat: communication limited by distance, per-map ranges, dead player options, team/vehicle modes, admin range adjustment.

random_fact_generator.shortDescription: Periodically shares Chuck Norris facts from an API
random_fact_generator.description: Fetches Chuck Norris facts periodically, option to replace name with player. Needs HTTP client & JSON.

rcon_chat.shortDescription: Redirects chat messages to RCON console
rcon_chat.description: Forwards chat to RCON console with player IDs, team/vehicle differentiation.

rules_command.description: /rules command displays server rules, configurable auto-announcements, timed display.

show_admin_names.description: Command to list online admins with permission levels.

simple_poll_system.shortDescription: Admin-controlled in-game voting system with timed polls
simple_poll_system.description: Admin-created timed polls, players vote via /vote, results broadcast at end.

taunt_on_end_messages.shortDescription: Playful taunts based on player performance
taunt_on_end_messages.description: End-game taunts based on kill count, from gentle ribbing to backhanded compliments.

team_chat.shortDescription: Private team communication system with invite functionality
team_chat.description: Private team channels, invite system, team/global modes, 1-3+ player private chats, permissions.

team_color_voting.description: Vote for team colors from 10+ presets between games, HUD display, auto apply winner.

welcome_messages.shortDescription: Customizable greeting system for new players
welcome_messages.description: Personalized join welcome messages, expandable for timed/player-specific greetings.

air_strike.shortDescription: Automated, randomized rocket strikes with player alerts
air_strike.description: Periodic rocket strikes at predefined map locations, random heights/trajectories, player warnings.

ammo_resupply.shortDescription: Resupply ammo, grenades, and energy batteries on command
ammo_resupply.description: Command to refill ammo, grenades, battery. Cooldowns, permission restrictions.

auto_troll.shortDescription: All-in-one server trolling toolkit with 17+ prank includes
auto_troll.description: 17+ prank modules: silent kills, damage mod, chat scramble, teleport, force exit, ammo manipulation, fake messages, inverted controls, etc. Permissions and target filters.

cheat_hax.shortDescription: Admin command to manipulate player scores
cheat_hax.description: /hax sets dead player's score/stats to 9999, all gametypes, admin level 4.

color_changer.shortDescription: Lets players customize their armor color
color_changer.description: Players change armor color via command, 18 colors, persists through respawns, admin restrictions.

color_reservation.shortDescription: Reserves armor colors for VIP players based on their unique hash
color_reservation.description: Reserve armor colors for VIPs by hash in FFA Slayer. Non-VIPs get random colors, color conflict protection.

custom_colors.shortDescription: Team and FFA color customization system
custom_colors.description: Custom team colors for all modes, extensive options.

custom_loadouts.description: Select weapon loadouts with custom ammo/grenades, persist across respawns.

custom_teleports.shortDescription: Configurable instant teleport points for any map
custom_teleports.description: Map-specific teleport zones, instant transport, adjustable radius, crouch-only option, shortcuts.

damage_multiplier.description: Admin adjusts player damage multiplier (1-10x) via command, optional reset, permissions.

damage_multiplier_changer.description: Global damage multiplier config for weapons, grenades, vehicles, environment.

deployable_mines.shortDescription: Adds tactical mine deployment for vehicles
deployable_mines.description: Deployable mines from vehicles: per-life limit, timed despawn, adjustable radius, team damage options, visual counter.

disable_fall_damage.description: Disable fall damage per map, configurable.

flashlight_vehicle_entry.shortDescription: Enter vehicles by aiming and using flashlight
flashlight_vehicle_entry.description: Enter vehicles by aiming+flashlight key, all standard vehicles, configurable.

flip_a_coin.description: Virtual coin flip command simulates thousands of flips instantly, shows stats, configurable.

flying_vehicles.description: Make ground vehicles fly via command, configurable vehicle selection, permissions, auto reset.

gravity_gun.description: Physics gravity gun: pick up/launch objects (vehicles, weapons, equipment). Configurable range, rotation, velocity, cooldowns, mass restrictions.

grenade_launcher.description: Convert weapons/vehicle guns to grenade launchers, configurable velocity, map-specific grenade types, toggleable, auto-disable on death option.

headshot_blocker.description: Disables headshot damage, all weapons/gametypes, no config needed.

health_regeneration.description: Gradual health regen, faster when lower health. Lightweight.

infinite_ammo.shortDescription: Grants all players unlimited ammunition in real time.
infinite_ammo.description: Keeps all players' ammo/clips maxed out at all times.

items_from_heaven.shortDescription: Random weapon/vehicle spawns across the map
items_from_heaven.description: Periodic random weapon/vehicle spawns at map locations, config intervals, auto cleanup of unused items.

item_sky_spawner.shortDescription: Drops random weapons and vehicles from the sky at map locations
item_sky_spawner.description: Auto-spawn random items at map coords, config timing, height, despawn.

killer_reward.description: Spawn weapons/equipment at victim's death location, drop tables, kill streak requirements, mixed modes.

kill_counter.description: Shows kill count after each kill, customizable messages.

kill_zones.shortDescription: Configurable danger areas that eliminate players after delay
kill_zones.description: Map kill zones: warns then kills after delay, team-specific, custom messages.

liberty_vehicle_spawner.shortDescription: On-demand vehicle spawning system with smart cleanup
liberty_vehicle_spawner.description: Instant vehicle spawn via chat, auto-enter, abandonment detection, despawn timers, multi-vehicle, per-map config.

market_account_saving.shortDescription: Persistent player economy with purchasable perks
market_account_saving.description: In-game economy: earn currency from combat, buy temporary perks (god mode, camo, damage boost). JSON account persistence, admin controls, cooldowns.

market_no_account_saving.description: Earn money, buy temporary perks, all reset on death/game end. Admin money commands.

melee_kicker.shortDescription: Instantly kicks players killed by melee attacks
melee_kicker.description: Melee kills instantly kick victim. Optional admin-only melee kicks. Works with flags/oddball.

nitrous_boost.shortDescription: Toggleable vehicle nitrous boost with HUD and cooldown.
nitrous_boost.description: Vehicle nitrous: flashlight key boost, finite meter, HUD, auto recharge.

no_damage.description: Toggle damage immunity via command, memory-based.

portal_gun_type_1.shortDescription: Shoot-to-teleport system that works in vehicles
portal_gun_type_1.description: Shoot to teleport, works on foot and in vehicles. Admin controls, persistent states.

portal_gun_type_2.description: Crouch + shoot to teleport, foot only. Admin controls, persistent.

rage_quit.shortDescription: Detects and announces rage quits after deaths
rage_quit.description: Detects rage quits (quit after death/short play), humorous broadcasts, configurable windows.

random_grenades.description: Random grenade counts on spawn, configurable ranges or map presets.

random_name.shortDescription: Replaces player names with random alternatives
random_name.description: Assign random names from pool, unique per session.

rank_system.shortDescription: Advanced ranking and progression system with persistent stats and leaderboards.
rank_system.description: Performance-based ranking: credits for actions, multi-tier ranks/grades, leaderboards, JSON persistence, admin management.

remove_grenades.description: Disable grenade spawning per gametype, keep pickups, for SWAT etc.

replace_weapon_projectile.shortDescription: Modifies weapon projectiles with custom effects
replace_weapon_projectile.description: Replace weapon projectiles with custom ones, damage multiplier, all weapons/vehicles.

rocket_launcher_malfunction.shortDescription: Random explosive failures for rocket launcher users
rocket_launcher_malfunction.description: Rockets randomly explode while held, config frequency, chaotic.

roll_the_dice.shortDescription: Random effect generator with 5 possible outcomes
roll_the_dice.description: Gamble command: random outcomes like vehicle spawn, weapon, inventory wipe, temp shield, launch.

self_destruction.description: Flashlight key triggers self-explosion, cooldown, visual effects.

server_fun_plus.description: Admin fun commands: rocketing, forced chat, fake joins/quits, random teleport, slap, spam, zap, nuke, color change, crash.

shield_regen.shortDescription: Immediate shield recharge after taking damage
shield_regen.description: Instant shield recharge after damage, configurable delay.

spawn_from_sky.shortDescription: Players spawn high above map with parachute effect
spawn_from_sky.description: Sky spawn with temp god mode until landing, pre-configured map spawn points.

spawn_protection.description: Post-spawn invulnerability, configurable time, option to block damage output.

spawn_where_killed.shortDescription: Players respawn at their death locations
spawn_where_killed.description: Respawn at exact death location, foot and vehicle.

sprint_system.description: Sprint system: stamina, speed boost, exhaustion, HUD, flashlight key, customizable.

stun_grenades.description: Grenades slow victims on explosion, varied durations per type.

super_jump.description: Super high jump with cooldown, togglable.

tactical_airstrike.description: Call airstrike at 5 kills, 3 targeting modes, map-specific, config projectiles, team restrictions.

tactical_insertion.shortDescription: Set custom spawn points during gameplay
tactical_insertion.description: Set next spawn point via command, limited uses, must be alive.

tea_bagging.shortDescription: Automatically detects and announces tea-bagging behavior
tea_bagging.description: Detects tea-bagging (crouching near corpses), broadcasts taunts, configurable radius/crouch count/cooldown, admin toggle.

truce.shortDescription: Lets players establish temporary peace agreements
truce.description: Truce system: request/accept/deny, mutual damage prevention, persistent across maps, status tracking.

uber.description: Summon yourself into teammate's vehicle, config seat priority, cooldowns, auto-eject, crouch activate.

vanish.description: Vanish mode: invisibility, camo, speed, invincibility, radar hide, objective restrictions. Warnings for carriers.

vehicle_fuel.shortDescription: Adds realistic fuel consumption, refueling stations, and an on-screen fuel gauge for vehicles.
vehicle_fuel.description: Fuel system: per-vehicle max fuel, speed-based consumption, refuel stations, live gauge. Snail mode when empty, map-specific stations.

weapon_durability_jam_system.shortDescription: Realistic weapon degradation and malfunction mechanics
weapon_durability_jam_system.description: Weapon durability: progressive decay, jamming per weapon type, melee to clear jams, ammo preserved, overheat prevention.

weighted_weapons.shortDescription: Realistic weapon weight and stamina mechanics
weighted_weapons.description: Weapon weight affects speed, stamina depletes when moving, regens at rest, exhaustion penalties, visual feedback.

attrition.shortDescription: Limited-life team deathmatch with revival mechanics
attrition.description: Limited-life team mode with revival: crouch over death orb (skull) to revive, visual progress, team-based, config timing.

capture_the_flag.shortDescription: Adds CTF gameplay to Slayer modes
capture_the_flag.description: CTF on Slayer maps: single flag, return to any base to score. Config scoring, flag respawn, map points, team/FFA support.

cranked.shortDescription: Kill-chained speed boost with timed explosion mechanic
cranked.description: Cranked: speed/damage boost after kill, must chain kills or explode. Per-map config, countdown timer, explosion death, boost params.

divide_and_conquer.description: Killing opponent converts them to your team. Team balance, min players, auto start, victory when team eliminated, auto map rotation.

frag_nation.description: Grenade-focused: limited grenades, kill rewards, melee when out, config loadouts, victory conditions, weapons/vehicles restricted, plasma pistol primary.

gun_game.shortDescription: Weapon progression deathmatch with demotion mechanics
gun_game.description: Weapon progression: advance tiers on kill, demotion on suicide, config loadouts, infinite ammo option, leaderboard, admin controls.

hunter_prey.description: FFA flag control: hold flag to score over time, auto respawn, map-specific locations, live scoring, leaderboards.

juggernaut.shortDescription: Power role survival with improved juggernaut abilities
juggernaut.description: Juggernaut mode: one powerful player with buffs, role passes on kill or time out, timed rotation, auto balancing, visual feedback.

kill_confirmed.shortDescription: Team objective mode with dog tag collection
kill_confirmed.description: Collect enemy dog tags to score, tag despawn timer, team scoring, top player tracking, all gametypes.

melee_attack.shortDescription: Intense melee-only combat with instant kill headshots
melee_attack.description: Melee only: no weapons/equipment, skull strike insta-kill, no pickups, oddball melee mechanics, optimized respawns.

mode_destroy_gun.shortDescription: Weapon mode that destroys objects on impact
mode_destroy_gun.description: Toggle mode: weapon fire destroys hit objects (vehicles, weapons, equipment). Object type feedback, permissions.

mode_enter_gun.shortDescription: Vehicle entry system using weapon fire
mode_enter_gun.description: Toggle mode: shoot vehicle to enter it. Various vehicles, admin toggle, feedback.

mode_spawn_gun.shortDescription: Creative mode that spawns objects when firing
mode_spawn_gun.description: Shoot to spawn objects (weapons, vehicles, powerups, 40+). Auto cleanup on death, manual cleanup.

needles_galore.shortDescription: Exclusive needler combat with customizable settings
needles_galore.description: Needler-only mode, config properties, infinite ammo option, no other weapons/vehicles, auto assignment, modifiers.

one_in_the_chamber.shortDescription: High-stakes pistol duel with limited ammunition
one_in_the_chamber.description: Pistol with 1 bullet, insta-kill, +1 per kill, melee when empty. Weapon restrictions, precision focus.

parkour.shortDescription: Timed obstacle course with checkpoints and leaderboards
parkour.description: Parkour: checkpoints, timed runs. Track best/avg times, completions, respawn at last checkpoint, death limits, run resets. Visual aids, commands for teleport/reset/leaderboard.

pre_game.shortDescription: Pre-match warmup mini-game with auto LO3 map reset
pre_game.description: Pre-match warmup: AR+2 frags, infinite time. At 3+ players, LO3 & map reset, then real game. All modes.

sabotage.description: Bomb plant/defuse: central bomb, crouch to plant/defuse, config timers, map locations, explosion rewards.

shotty_snipes.shortDescription: Shotgun and sniper rifle only combat
shotty_snipes.description: Shotgun & sniper only, no other weapons/vehicles. Config: infinite ammo, bottomless clip, damage modifiers, auto assign.

snipers_dream_team.shortDescription: All-in-one weapon and vehicle overhaul mod for Halo, enhancing projectile physics, damage, and explosion effects.
snipers_dream_team.description: Overhauls 20+ weapons/vehicle guns: projectile physics, custom explosions, per-weapon mods, vehicle weapon upgrades, grenade tweaks. Memory-based, not for competitive.

survival_slayer.description: Survival Slayer: countdown life timer, +time per kill, first to kill limit wins. HUD timer, configurable base time, bonus, limit.

swat.description: SWAT: headshot-only with pistol/sniper, no other weapons/vehicles. Config: infinite ammo, bottomless clip, score limits, loadouts.

tag.description: Tag: Tagger chases Runners, tag transfers role. Runners score over time, Tagger bonus per tag. Config rotation, speed, scores, duration.

team_defender.description: Team Defender: hold flag for double team points, assist bonus. Roles: carrier, defenders, attackers. Random flag spawn, config respawn, multipliers.

t_slayer_team_spawns.shortDescription: Enforces team-specific spawning in Team Slayer
t_slayer_team_spawns.description: Enforces team-specific spawn points in Team Slayer.

zombies_advanced.shortDescription: Team-based zombie survival mode with alpha zombies, last-man-standing bonuses.
zombies_advanced.description: Zombies: humans vs zombies, convert on kill, Alpha/Standard types, Last Man Standing bonuses, camo, vehicle restrictions, config attributes.

zombies_standard.shortDescription: Classic team-based zombie survival mode with simple human vs zombie gameplay.
zombies_standard.description: Basic zombies: convert on kill, simple speed/respawn adjustments, zombie camo, win when all infected.

map_coordinates.shortDescription: Library of spawn coordinates for all standard Halo maps
map_coordinates.description: Library of spawn/teleport coordinates for all standard maps, for reuse.

pagination.shortDescription: Standalone pagination library for displaying tabular data in pages
pagination.description: Pagination library: config page size, navigation, boundary checks, flexible formatting, hints.

rcon_text.shortDescription: Advanced RCON message system with queuing and lifecycle management
rcon_text.description: Advanced RCON messages: multi-format, priority queues (Low-High-Critical), display modes (persistent/timed/repeating), grouping, player/global, conditional, lifecycle management.

score_handler.shortDescription: Advanced scoring system with custom point values
score_handler.description: Custom scoring: point values for headshots, assassinations, flag captures, betrayals, zombies, kill streaks.

uber_vehicles.shortDescription: Vehicle configuration library defining seat roles, insertion order, and whitelisting
uber_vehicles.description: Vehicle config library for Uber system: tag paths, seats, enabled status, display names, insertion order, whitelist. Stock/custom vehicles.

beep_on_join.description: System beep on player join, audible alert.

console_logo.shortDescription: Custom ASCII art display for server console
console_logo.description: Custom ASCII art logo in console, with variables, colors, centering.

countdown_timer.shortDescription: Basic countdown timer for game events

ctf_flag_position_logger.shortDescription: Logs CTF flag spawn coordinates for map data collection
ctf_flag_position_logger.description: Logs CTF flag spawn coordinates at game start to console, for map data collection.

discord.description: Discord integration for server events, configurable event types, requires SAPPDiscordBot.

game_countdown.shortDescription: Displays remaining game time in HH:MM:SS format
game_countdown.description: Live countdown of game time left in HH:MM:SS.

live_on_3.shortDescription: Competitive match countdown system with auto map reset
live_on_3.description: LO3 countdown with map reset, permissions, death message suppression.

notify_me.description: Console notifications: color-coded events, custom formatting, player tracking, ASCII art, timestamps.

status_timer.shortDescription: Periodic player count display in console
status_timer.description: Periodic console player count / max slots (default every 3s).

auto_eject.shortDescription: Prevents players from entering vehicles by automatically ejecting them.
auto_eject.description: Force ejects players from any vehicle they enter, 1s loop check. Infantry-only.

auto_lead.description: Auto sets no-lead per map/gametype, map-specific presets, adjusts on rotation.

block_replace_objects.shortDescription: Object management system for map customization
block_replace_objects.description: Block or replace specific objects (weapons, vehicles, equipment) per map, runtime control.

block_team_damage.description: Blocks all team damage: weapons, grenades, vehicle collisions. Configurable, live monitoring.

command_spy.shortDescription: Admin command monitoring and logging system
command_spy.description: Logs admin command usage with notification levels, blacklist, detailed logs.

custom_command_cooldowns.description: Cooldown timers per command, player-specific, anti-spam, monitoring.

custom_spawns.description: Custom spawn points per map/team, FFA support, avoid overlaps, caching, retries.

custom_vehicle_spawner.shortDescription: Persistent vehicle management and respawn system
custom_vehicle_spawner.description: Custom vehicle spawns with auto respawn on abandon/destroy, position monitoring.

custom_wdel.shortDescription: Modified weapon deletion that protects objective items
custom_wdel.description: wdel that protects flags/oddball from deletion.

cyborg_spawner.description: Spawns decorative cyborgs at map locations.

delay_skip.description: Delays map skip vote for configurable time, with notifications.

dynamic_ping_kicker.shortDescription: Adaptive ping management system with player count-based thresholds
dynamic_ping_kicker.description: Adaptive ping kicker: limits adjust with player count, warnings, admin immunity, logging.

dynamic_race_laps.shortDescription: Automatically adjusts the lap score limit based on player count.
dynamic_race_laps.description: Adjusts race lap limit based on player count, per-map size configs, auto announce.

dynamic_score_limit.shortDescription: Automatically adjusts game score limits based on player count
dynamic_score_limit.description: Adjusts score limits dynamically by player count, per gametype configs.

geo_location.shortDescription: Geolocate joining players and optionally block countries using IP API
geo_location.description: Geolocate players on join via ip-api.com, optional country block. Display fields, /country command, cache (1h TTL), debug IP. Needs JSON, HTTP client.

get_object_identity.shortDescription: Admin tool for inspecting in-game objects
get_object_identity.description: Admin object inspector: type, name, meta ID, coordinates, permissions.

get_server_name.shortDescription: Accesses and utilizes server name information
get_server_name.description: Retrieves server name, example for welcome messages.

item_spawner.shortDescription: Spawn weapons, vehicles, and items with seat and amount options.
item_spawner.description: Spawn weapons, vehicles, equipment, bipeds, projectiles. Caching, cleanup, paginated listing.

list_players.shortDescription: Displays detailed player information with configurable output format
list_players.description: Admin player list with IP, team, connection status, customizable output.

mapcycle_manager.shortDescription: All-in-one map rotation system with multiple cycle types and adjustments
mapcycle_manager.description: Mapcycle manager: size-based cycles, admin controls, auto adjust for player count, extensive config.

map_list.shortDescription: Displays current and upcoming map rotation information
map_list.description: Shows current/next maps and modes from mapcycle, customizable.

map_list_with_map_spec.shortDescription: Improved map cycle monitoring with position tracking and spec indexing
map_list_with_map_spec.description: Map cycle monitor with position tracking, spec indexing, live tracking, position queries.

map_skip_tally.shortDescription: Tracks and persists map skip votes across game sessions with detailed statistics
map_skip_tally.description: Skip vote tally persists across matches, player-specific, JSON storage, admin queries.

map_vote_system.shortDescription: Improved replacement for SAPP's default voting with expanded includes and customization
map_vote_system.description: Enhanced map voting: unlimited options, re-voting, streak protection, timing controls, feedback.

object_spawner.description: Spawn predefined objects at specific coords per map, rotation, persistent.

on_teleport.description: Detects player teleports by position change, for debugging/anti-cheat.

per_map_score_limits.shortDescription: Sets the score limit at game start based on the map
per_map_score_limits.description: Set score limit per map at game start, default fallback.

play_time.description: Tracks player playtime: total hours, join count, session duration. JSON persistence, individual/server queries.

race_assistant.shortDescription: Vehicle enforcement system for race gametypes
race_assistant.description: Forces vehicle use in race: grace periods, warnings, penalties, safe zones, admin exemptions.

reg_to_play.shortDescription: Enforces mandatory player registration with timed kick enforcement.
reg_to_play.description: Mandatory registration with password, time limit, auto-kick, persistent players.txt, permissions.

restart_mapcycle.description: Restarts mapcycle after delay when server empty, prevents stagnation.

script_manager.description: Load/unload scripts per map/gametype, error handling.

seed_score_protection.shortDescription: Prevents score loss when killing bot/seed players
seed_score_protection.description: Prevents score loss from killing bot/seed players, config bot names.

server_logger.shortDescription: Advanced server logging system with customizable event tracking
server_logger.description: Logs game events (joins, deaths, commands) with timestamps, config event types, sensitive command filtering, pirate detection.

server_name_changer.description: Rotates server name from list at intervals.

set_respawn_time.description: Config respawn time per map/gametype, admin override, global/player-specific, silent mode.

sync_admins.description: Sync admins.txt/users.txt with remote server, fallback to local backups, HTTP, validation.

sync_your_files.shortDescription: Remote file synchronization with backup fallback
sync_your_files.description: Sync specified files with remote, local backup fallback, keyword validation.

teleport_manager.shortDescription: Advanced teleport system with persistent warps
teleport_manager.description: Teleport system: map-specific warps, create/delete/list, location history, overwrite protection.

timed_server_password.shortDescription: Auto password removal after configurable duration
timed_server_password.description: Removes server password after config time (default 5 min), notifies players.

track_master.shortDescription: Live race tracking and leaderboard system for Halo maps.
track_master.description: Race tracker: live lap times, personal bests, map/global records, avg lap, total laps. JSON storage, commands for stats/top5/rankings, auto announces records. FFA & Team.

vehicle_blocker_v1.description: Restrict vehicle access per map, seat restrictions (driver/passenger/gunner), auto eject, delay.

vehicle_blocker_v2.description: Improved vehicle blocker: better handling, player teleportation on block, smoother transitions.

vehicle_tag_utility.shortDescription: Records vehicle tag names to a file for server analysis
vehicle_tag_utility.description: Logs vehicle tag path to file on command, for analysis. Appends to vehicle_tag_utility.txt.

vote_kick.shortDescription: Player-driven moderation with configurable voting thresholds
vote_kick.description: Vote kick: players vote to kick, % threshold, admin immune, cooldown, anonymous voting, cancel.

weapon_assigner.description: Assign weapon loadouts per map/mode/team, up to 4 weapons, tag validation, fallback configs.
